title: Pasania rotundata
taxonomy: Pasania rotundata is classified under the family of Meliaceae and the order Sapindales. It belongs to the genus Pasania, which is a group of trees. The species rotundata is further classified under the subfamily Cedreloideae. Pasania rotundata is native to tropical Asia and is often found in the Himalayas. The plant is a type of deciduous tree that grows in the wild.
uses: Pasania rotundata is reported to have various medicinal uses, including the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems.
